---
title: "Beta Binomial"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
qb_data_clean <- read_csv("./data/cleaned_data.csv")

#2015–2024 to build the prior
historical_qbs <- qb_data_clean %>%
  filter(year >= 2015, year <= 2024)


#2025 for the posterior analysis
qbs_2025 <- qb_data_clean %>%
  filter(year == 2025)

historical_qbs <- historical_qbs %>%
  mutate(comp_rate = Comp_Percentage / 100)
```

```{r}
m <- mean(historical_qbs$comp_rate)
v <- var(historical_qbs$comp_rate)

m 
v

alpha_prior <- m * ((m * (1 - m) / v) - 1)
beta_prior  <- (1 - m) * ((m * (1 - m) / v) - 1)

alpha_prior
beta_prior

qb_posteriors <- qb_data_clean %>%
  mutate(
    alpha_post = alpha_prior + Completions,
    beta_post  = beta_prior + (Attempts - Completions)
  )
```

```{r}
curve(dbeta(x, alpha_prior, beta_prior), from = 0, to = 1,
      main = "Estimated Beta prior for QB accuracy",
      xlab = "True completion probability", ylab = "Density")
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 <- qbs_2025 %>%
  mutate(
    alpha_post = alpha_prior + Completions,
    beta_post  = beta_prior + (Attempts - Completions),
    post_mean  = alpha_post / (alpha_post + beta_post),
    lower_95   = qbeta(0.025, alpha_post, beta_post),
    upper_95   = qbeta(0.975, alpha_post, beta_post)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(post_mean))

posterior_2025
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  mutate(raw_rate = Completions / Attempts) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = raw_rate, y = post_mean, label = Player)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Raw completion % vs Bayesian posterior mean",
    x = "Raw completion rate",
    y = "Posterior mean of true accuracy"
  )

```

```{r}
ranking_table <- posterior_2025 %>%
  transmute(
    Player,
    GS,
    Attempts,
    Completions,
    Raw_Comp_Pct = round(100 * Completions / Attempts, 1),
    Posterior_Mean = round(100 * post_mean, 1),
    CI_Lower = round(100 * lower_95, 1),
    CI_Upper = round(100 * upper_95, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Posterior_Mean))

ranking_table
```

```{r}
qb1 <- posterior_2025 %>% filter(Player == "Jared Goff")
qb2 <- posterior_2025 %>% filter(Player == "Matthew Stafford")
```

```{r}
set.seed(84735)

draws <- tibble(
  theta1 = rbeta(10000, qb1$alpha_post, qb1$beta_post),
  theta2 = rbeta(10000, qb2$alpha_post, qb2$beta_post)
)

mean(draws$theta1 > draws$theta2)
```

```{r}
x_vals <- seq(0.5, 0.8, length.out = 1000)

plot_df <- tibble(
  x = x_vals,
  goff = dbeta(x_vals, qb1$alpha_post, qb1$beta_post),
  stafford = dbeta(x_vals, qb2$alpha_post, qb2$beta_post)
) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(goff, stafford), names_to = "QB", values_to = "density")

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = x, y = density, color = QB)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior distributions of true completion accuracy",
    x = "True completion probability",
    y = "Density"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(historical_qbs, aes(x = comp_rate)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 21, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of QB Completion Rates (2015–2024)",
    x = "Completion Rate",
    y = "Number of QB Seasons"
  )
```

```{r}
curve(
  dbeta(x, alpha_prior, beta_prior),
  from = 0, to = 1,
  lwd = 2,
  col = "darkred",
  main = "Prior Distribution for QB Accuracy",
  xlab = "True Completion Probability",
  ylab = "Density"
)
```

```{r}
ggplot(qbs_2025, aes(x = Attempts, y = Completions / Attempts)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Raw Completion Percentage vs Pass Attempts (2025)",
    x = "Pass Attempts",
    y = "Completion Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  mutate(raw_rate = Completions / Attempts) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = raw_rate, y = post_mean)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Raw Completion Rate vs Bayesian Estimate",
    x = "Raw Completion Rate",
    y = "Posterior Mean Completion Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  arrange(post_mean) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = post_mean, y = reorder(Player, post_mean))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_95, xmax = upper_95), height = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior Estimates of QB Accuracy (2025)",
    x = "Posterior Mean Completion Probability",
    y = "Quarterback"
  )
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  mutate(raw_rate = Completions / Attempts,
         shrinkage = post_mean - raw_rate) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Attempts, y = shrinkage)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Bayesian Shrinkage vs Sample Size",
    x = "Pass Attempts",
    y = "Posterior Adjustment"
  )
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  mutate(raw_rate = Completions / Attempts) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rank(raw_rate), y = rank(post_mean))) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Ranking Comparison: Raw vs Bayesian",
    x = "Raw Completion % Rank",
    y = "Bayesian Rank"
  )
```

```{r}
curve(dbeta(x, alpha_prior, beta_prior), 0, 1, col="red", lwd=2)
curve(dbeta(x, qb1$alpha_post, qb1$beta_post), add=TRUE, col="blue", lwd=2)
legend("topright", legend=c("Prior","Posterior"), col=c("red","blue"), lwd=2)
```

```{r}
seasons_per_player <- qb_data_clean %>%
  group_by(Player) %>%
  summarise(
    seasons_played = n_distinct(year)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(seasons_played))

qb_data_clean <- qb_data_clean %>%
  group_by(Player) %>%
  mutate(
    seasons_played = n_distinct(year)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qb_experience <- qb_data_clean %>%
  group_by(Player) %>%
  summarise(
    seasons_played = n_distinct(year),
    total_attempts = sum(Attempts, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_completions = sum(Completions, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(seasons_played), desc(total_attempts))

qb_experience
```

```{r}
ggplot(seasons_per_player, aes(x = seasons_played)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 11) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Seasons Played by Quarterbacks",
    x = "Number of Seasons",
    y = "Number of Quarterbacks"
  )
```

```{r}
qb_data_clean %>%
  mutate(comp_rate = Completions / Attempts) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = seasons_played, y = comp_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Completion Rate vs Career Experience",
    x = "Seasons Played",
    y = "Completion Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  mutate(raw_rate = Completions / Attempts) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = raw_rate, y = post_mean)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_abline(linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Raw Completion Rate vs Bayesian Estimate",
    x = "Raw Completion Rate",
    y = "Posterior Mean Completion Probability"
  )
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  arrange(post_mean) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = post_mean, y = reorder(Player, post_mean))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_95, xmax = upper_95), height = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior Estimates of QB Accuracy",
    x = "Posterior Mean Completion Probability",
    y = "Quarterback"
  )
```

```{r}
historical_qbs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = comp_rate)) +
  geom_density(fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Density of QB Completion Rates",
    x = "Completion Rate",
    y = "Density"
  )
```

```{r}
historical_qbs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Attempts, y = comp_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Completion Rate vs Pass Attempts",
    x = "Attempts",
    y = "Completion Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
historical_qbs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = comp_rate)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Completion Rate by Season",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Completion Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
historical_qbs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Attempts)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "orange") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of QB Pass Attempts",
    x = "Attempts",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

```{r}
qb_data_clean %>%
  mutate(comp_rate = Completions / Attempts) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = seasons_played, y = comp_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Completion Rate vs Career Experience",
    x = "Seasons Played",
    y = "Completion Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
historical_qbs %>%
  mutate(comp_rate = Completions / Attempts) %>%
  arrange(desc(comp_rate)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = comp_rate, y = reorder(Player, comp_rate))) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Historical QB Completion Rates",
    x = "Completion Rate",
    y = "Quarterback"
  )
```

```{r}
theta <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 1000)

prior_df <- data.frame(
  theta = theta,
  density = dbeta(theta, alpha_prior, beta_prior)
)

ggplot(prior_df, aes(x = theta, y = density)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred") +
  labs(
    title = "Prior Distribution for QB Completion Probability",
    x = "Completion Probability",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
posterior_df <- data.frame(
  theta = theta,
  prior = dbeta(theta, alpha_prior, beta_prior),
  posterior = dbeta(theta, alpha_post, beta_post)
)

ggplot(posterior_df, aes(x = theta)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = prior, color = "Prior"), size = 1.2) +
  geom_line(aes(y = posterior, color = "Posterior"), size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Prior vs Posterior Distribution of QB Accuracy",
    x = "Completion Probability",
    y = "Density",
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
